    G

    generic(String) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.EmptyStateConfig
     
    GenericModalLoader - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers
    Combines asynchronous data loading with paginated modal display.
    GenericModalLoader() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.GenericModalLoader
     
    Genre - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity
    JPA entity representing a music genre.
    Genre() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity.Genre
     
    GenreFilterService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
    GenreFilterService provides filtering logic for songs and albums by genre.
    GenreFilterService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.GenreFilterService
     
    GenreRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Genre entities.
    get(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Returns the element at the given index using bidirectional traversal.
    getAlbumComparator() - Method in enum class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.SortStrategy
    Returns a Comparator for sorting Album entities according to this strategy.
    getAllAlbums() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LibraryService
     
    getAllArtists() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LibraryService
     
    getAllArtistsRankedByTime() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns all artists in the library ranked by total listening time descending.
    getAllAvailableYears() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.graph.ChartViewModel
    Retrieves all available years with listening data.
    getAllSongs() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LibraryService
     
    getAllSongs() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.SongImportService
     
    getAllTopAlbums() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns all top albums sorted by total listening time, descending.
    getAllTopArtists() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending.
    getAllTopSongs() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns all top songs sorted by total listening time, descending.
    getArtistDrillInCallback() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.ArtistDiscographyNavigation
    Returns the reusable callback for artist drill-in navigation.
    getArtistFontSize() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getArtistTotalSeconds(Artist) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ArtistListeningTimeService
     
    getAvailableMonths(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.MonthlyReportService
    Returns list of available months for a given year.
    getAvailableWeeks(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.WeeklyReportService
    Returns list of available week numbers for a given year.
    getAvailableYears() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.YearEndReportService
    Returns the distinct years for which the current user has any playback history, sorted in descending order (most recent first).
    getControlSpacing() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getCurrentUserId() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.UserSessionService
    Returns the current user's ID, or null if no user is logged in.
    getCurrentUserPlaylists() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(n) where n = number of user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n)
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.SortStrategy
    Returns a readable display name for this strategy, used in the sort dropdown in the library view.
    getDummyHash() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Returns the dummy BCrypt hash used for timing-safe authentication checks when no account exists for the submitted username.
    getFavouriteCount() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.FavouriteService
     
    getFirst() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Returns the first element in the list without removing it.
    getInfoSectionSpacing() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getLast() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Returns the last element in the list without removing it.
    getListeningHistory() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningHistoryService
    Returns complete listening history as a DoublyLinkedList for pagination.
    getListeningHistoryCount() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningHistoryService
    Gets total count of valid listening history entries.
    getListeningHistoryWindow(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningHistoryService
    Gets a specific window from listening history.
    getLockoutMessage(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Returns a human-readable message describing the current lockout state for the given username, suitable for display in the UI.
    getMonthlyListeningTime(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.YearEndReportService
    Returns a map of YearMonth → total listening minutes for chart visualization.
    getNavIconSize() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getOrGenerateMonthlyReport(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.MonthlyReportService
    Returns an existing monthly report for the current user, year, and month, or generates a new one if none exists.
    getOrGenerateWeeklyReport(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.WeeklyReportService
    Returns an existing weekly report for the current user, year, and week, or generates a new one if none exists.
    getOrGenerateYearReport(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.YearEndReportService
    Returns an existing year-end report for the current user and year, or generates a new one if none exists.
    getOrLoad(String, Supplier) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.AnalyticsCacheService
    Returns the cached list for key, or loads it via loader on a cache miss, stores it, and returns the result.
    getPlaylistById(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(1) database lookup by ID Space Complexity: O(1)
    getPlaylistSongCount(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
    getPlaylistSongs(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(1) memory access Space Complexity: O(n) where n = songs in playlist
    getPlayPauseIconSize() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getRecentlyPlayed(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaybackTrackingService
    Time Complexity: O(n) where n = playback history size Space Complexity: O(n)
    getRemainingAttempts(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Returns the number of remaining attempts before the next lockout tier is triggered for the given username.
    getSessionDurationSeconds() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.UserSessionService
    Returns the number of seconds elapsed since the user logged in.
    getSongComparator() - Method in enum class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.SortStrategy
    Returns a Comparator for sorting Song entities according to this strategy.
    getStylesheets() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Dashboard.PlaybackPanelController
     
    getStylesheets() - Method in interface com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.shared.StyledView
     
    getStylesheets() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.UIComponent
     
    getTimeFontSize() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getTitleFontSize() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.PlayerConfig
     
    getTopAlbumsCount() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns the number of distinct albums that have at least one valid play in the current user's playback history.
    getTopAlbumsWindow(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns the full top albums ranking for use by TopAlbumsViewModel.
    getTopArtistsAllTime(int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ArtistListeningTimeService
    Time Complexity: O(n log k) where n = total plays, k = limit Query all plays: O(n) Group by artist: O(n) Filter & validate: O(n) Take top k: O(k) Space Complexity: O(n) for grouping, O(k) for result
    getTopArtistsForYear(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.YearEndReportService
    Returns the top N most-listened-to artists for the current user in the given year.
    getTopArtistsWindow(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns the full top artists ranking for use by analytics preview cards.
    getTopSongsCount() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns the number of distinct songs that have at least one valid play in the current user's playback history.
    getTopSongsForYear(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.YearEndReportService
    Returns the top N most-played songs for the current user in the given year.
    getTopSongsWindow(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.ListeningPaginationService
    Returns the full top songs ranking for use by TopSongsViewModel.
    getUserFavourites() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.FavouriteService
     
    getUserFavouritesSortedByDate() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.FavouriteService
     
    getWindow(int, int) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Returns a window (page) of elements from the list.
